description_long: This is an adult male figure dressed in formal business attire, featuring a tailored suit jacket, matching trousers, and a collared dress shirt with a necktie. The suit is complemented by a pocket square and dress shoes, giving a polished, professional appearance suitable for urban or office environments. The figure's posture suggests a walking motion, with arms slightly bent and one leg forward. The facial features are clean-shaven, and the hair is neatly styled and short. The overall build is average, with realistic human proportions and naturalistic limb articulation. No accessories or carried objects are visible, and the clothing fits closely to the body, emphasizing a businesslike demeanor.
description: A formally dressed adult male in a business suit, walking with a confident posture. The figure features a suit, tie, dress shirt, and dress shoes, with neatly styled short hair.
description_view_0: Front view shows the suit, tie, dress shirt, pocket square, and facial features clearly.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, the suit's fit, and the stride of the left leg.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the suit jacket, trousers, and the back of the head and shoes.
description_view_3: Right side view shows the right profile, arm position, and the stride of the right leg.
attribute_clothing_type: business suit with collared dress shirt and necktie
